title: More Radical Trainers: SV
description: Additional Trainers for the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod
body:
**Version 1.8** and onwards require the **Mega Showdown** mod as well as the **v0.16** version of the **Radical Cobblemon Trainers** mod.

**Version 1.6** and onwards require the v0.14 version of the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod. 

**Version 1.3 and onwards require [SimpleTMs](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon) and [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges).**
 
**Version 1.2 to 1.7** require the CobblemonMegas mod, datapack and resourcepack, find it at the following link: [CobblemonMegas Mod / Datapack / Resource Pack](https://discord.com/channels/934267676354834442/1311697798248530002/1335090167547035648). I have been told it works with **Mega Showdown** too.

This is a very simple datapack that adds more Trainers to the Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod. This includes the following series:

## Standalone Series (No Prerequisites)
These series can be started immediately without completing any other series:

### **1. Pokémon Adventures**

- Title: Pokémon Adventures
- Description: Meet the heroes from the Pokémon Adventures manga! Can you beat them all?
- Difficulty: 5/10
- **Defeat Yellow to unlock Crystal, Ruby and Diamond.** Beating each one of these three will unlock the other two members from their trio respectively:
- **Crystal > Gold > Silver**
- **Ruby > Sapphire > Emerald**
- **Diamond > Pearl > Platinum**
- Defeat Silver, Emerald and Platinum to unlock **Blue, Green and Red**!
- Black, White, Blake and Whitley are optional battles in v1.7 as well!


### **2. Sinnoh Gym Challenge**

- Title: Sinnoh Gym Challenge
- Description: Gym Leaders from the Sinnoh region are here to test your skills. Are you up to the challenge? All Sinnoh Gym Challenge battles are Double Battles. 
- Difficulty: 4/10

### 3. Team Aqua
- Title: Team Aqua
- Description: Team Aqua is up to no good in the Overworld! Can you take them on?
- Difficulty: 4/10

### 4. Team Magma

- Title: Team Magma
- Description: Team Magma is up to no good in the Nether! Can you take them on? 
- Difficulty: 4/10

### 5. Unova Gym Challenge

- Title: Unova Gym Challenge
- Description: Gym Leaders from the Unova region are here to test your skills. Are you up to the challenge? 
- Difficulty: 5/10

### 6. Hoenn Gym Challenge

- Title: Hoenn Gym Challenge
- Description: Gym Leaders from the Hoenn region are here to test your skills. Are you up to the challenge?
- Difficulty: 3/10

### 7. Kalos Gym Challenge
 
- Title: Kalos Gym Challenge
- Description: Gym Leaders from the Kalos region are here to test your skills. Are you up to the challenge? 
- (The Kalos Gym Challenge trainers have team levels upwards of 90, and use Mega Evolved Pokemon)
- Difficulty: 6/10

### 8. Paldea Gym Challenge

- Title: Paldea Gym Challenge
- Description: Take on the Gym Leaders of Paldea in the Paldea Gym Challenge!
- Difficulty: 4/10

## **Series with Prerequisites:**

These series require completion of other series before they can be accessed:

### **9. Team Plasma**

- Title: Team Plasma
- Description: We, Team Plasma, stand for liberation!
- Difficulty: 5/10
- Requires: Unova Gym Challenge

### **10. Unova League Challenge**

- Title: Unova League Challenge
- Description: Battle the Elite Four and Champion from the Unova Region! Are you ready?
- Difficulty: 5/10
- Requires: Unova Gym Challenge

### **11. Hoenn League Challenge**

- Title: Hoenn League Challenge
- Description: Time to face the Elite Four from the Hoenn Region! Are you ready? 
- Difficulty: 6/10
- Requires: Hoenn Gym Challenge

### **12. Kalos League Challenge**

- Title: Kalos League Challenge
- Description: Face the Elite Four and Champion from the Kalos Region! Are you ready?
- Difficulty: 6/10
- Requires: Kalos Gym Challenge

### **13. Team Plasma's Seven Sages**

- Title: Team Plasma's Seven Sages
- Description: Hunt down the Seven Sages of Team Plasma to put an end to their crimes for good!
- Difficulty: 6/10
- Requires: Both Unova League Challenge AND Team Plasma

### **14. Unova (B2W2) Challenge**

- Title: Unova (B2W2) Challenge
- Description: Battle the Gym leaders and Champion from Pokémon B2W2!
- Difficulty: 6/10
- Requires: Both Unova Gym Challenge AND Unova League Challenge

### **15. Neo Team Plasma**

- Title: Neo Team Plasma
- Description: Battle and defeat a reorganized Team Plasma!
- Difficulty: 6/10
- Requires: Team Plasma's Seven Sages

### **16. Paldea Elite Four**

- Title: Paldea Elite Four
- Description: Take on the Elite Four of Paldea in the Paldea Elite Four challenge!
- Difficulty: 4/10
- Requires: Paldea Gym Challenge

### **17. Starfall Street**

- Title: Starfall Street
- Description: Take on the bosses of Team Star at Starfall Street!
- Difficulty: 4/10
- Requires: Paldea Gym Challenge


The difficulty is medium to hard, with all of the Pokemon having max EVs and IVs and some competitive movesets. 

[Optional Texture Pack Link](https://github.com/Fyre520/More-Radical-Textures/releases/tag/1.8)

[Advancements Localization Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mct-localization) by Thirace

This is my first datapack, so any help is welcomed. 

Credits to @hdainester for the amazing Radical Cobblemon Trainers mod!

Hope you enjoy!
